title: Clockwork SMP Modpack
description: Clockwork SMP is a Create Mod based feature-packed modpack for anyone!
body:
![Clockwork SMP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a48fe007a6f6c3962bbcbf041f98c070d3cb3555.png)

---

# Welcome to the Clockwork SMP!
Clockwork SMP is a Create Mod based modpack, with loads of features & content to make anything from adventuring to building as fun as it can be!

## Features
- **Create Mod + Addons** — One of the most popular tech mods out there, and with many of its addons, these bring lots of new content into the game.
  
- **Better Experience** — With mods such as Xaero's World Map (& Minimap), FancyMenu, Ok Zoomer, Forgematica, and many others, it makes the client-side experience filled with useful tools and features.
  
- **QOL Tools** — Includes Simple Voice Chat, Corpse (as an alternative to keepInventory), and many other features!
  
- **Optimized Performance** — Runs smoothly on most computers, due to mods like Sodium, Clumps, and many more!

## Community & Server

Join our public SMP and connect with other automation fans!  

Discord: https://discord.clockworksmp.xyz

Server: play.clockworksmp.xyz:25565

---

## Attributions:
This modpack includes the following mods that require attribution:

**Camera Mod:** [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/camera-mod) **|** [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/camera-mod)  

**Corpse:** [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/corpse) **|** [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/corpse)  

**Simple Voice Chat:** [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-voice-chat) **|** [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)

**_Please visit the linked pages for more information and support the mod authors!_**
